welcome_offer.description: Earn up to 100,000 Membership Rewards points after spending $6,000 in eligible purchases in the first 6 months.

earning_rates.notes: Worldwide, on up to $50,000 in purchases per calendar year.
At U.S. supermarkets, on up to $25,000 in purchases per calendar year.
Booked directly with airlines or on AmexTravel.com.
On prepaid hotels booked through AmexTravel.com.

other_benefits.name: The Hotel Collection
other_benefits.description: $100 credit on eligible charges when booking 2+ nights via Amex Travel.

recurring_credits.name: Uber Cash
recurring_credits.description: $10 Uber Cash each month to use on orders and rides in the U.S.

recurring_credits.name: Dunkin' Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $7 in monthly statement credits at U.S. Dunkin' locations

recurring_credits.name: Resy Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $50 in statement credits semi-annually at U.S. Resy restaurants

recurring_credits.name: Dining Credit (Grubhub)
recurring_credits.description: Up to $10 in monthly statement credits at Grubhub, The Cheesecake Factory, Goldbelly, Wine.com, and Five Guys
